faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth problem in my New Rochelle home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small holes in wool, silk, or cashmere garments, webbing in closet corners, silken cocoons on clothing, and small tan or gold-colored moths flying around closets or bedrooms. You may also notice larvae (small white caterpillars) on fabrics or shed casings in storage areas. If you observe any of these signs in your New Rochelle home, immediate professional treatment is recommended.

faqs.question: What factors affect the cost of clothes moth control in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: Pricing ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of infestation, the size of your home, number of affected rooms, and treatment methods required. Larger New Rochelle properties with extensive closet systems or multiple infested areas require more comprehensive treatment. Follow-up visits, fabric treatments, and preventative measures also influence total cost. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout New Rochelle and Westchester County for urgent clothes moth situations. faqs.question: Are your clothes moth treatments safe for my family and fabrics?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted, fabric-safe treatments specifically designed for clothes moth control that eliminate pests without damaging your garments or posing risks to your family and pets. Our methods include pheromone monitoring, strategic insecticide application in non-fabric areas, heat treatments when appropriate, and thorough vacuuming protocols. We'll provide clear instructions for any temporary precautions needed during treatment of your New Rochelle home.
